# Decision Log: [Project / Initiative Name]

> **Usage:** Record every significant decision made during the project — especially those that affect scope, architecture, process, or resourcing. Capturing context and rationale prevents relitigating past decisions and helps onboard new team members.

---

## Decision Log

| ID | Date | Decision | Context & Rationale | Alternatives Considered | Decision Maker | Stakeholders Informed | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DEC-001 | YYYY-MM-DD | [Short decision statement] | [Why this decision was made] | [What else was considered] | [Name / Role] | [Names / Roles] | Accepted |
| DEC-002 | YYYY-MM-DD | [Short decision statement] | [Why this decision was made] | [What else was considered] | [Name / Role] | [Names / Roles] | Accepted |

**Status values:** Proposed · Under Review · Accepted · Superseded · Reversed

---

## Template — Individual Decision Entry

Copy this block when adding a new decision.

```
### DEC-XXX: [Short decision title]

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| **Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Decision Maker** | [Name, Role] |
| **Stakeholders Informed** | [Names / Roles] |
| **Status** | Accepted |

**Decision:**
[One or two sentence description of the decision.]

**Context & Rationale:**
[Why was this decision made? What problem does it solve? Include any relevant constraints.]

**Alternatives Considered:**
1. [Option A] — [Why it was not chosen]
2. [Option B] — [Why it was not chosen]

**Consequences / Trade-offs:**
[What are the implications? What does this make harder or easier?]

**Related Items:**
- RAID Log entry: [R/A/I/D-XXX]
- PR / Issue: [link]
```

---

## Review Log

| Date | Reviewer | Changes Made |
|---|---|---|
| YYYY-MM-DD | [Name] | Initial log created |
| YYYY-MM-DD | [Name] | [Description of update] |
